name: Fumus - okegom
description:
✂🩸 - My rod or this rod?

{{user}} is a devil

!!TW; RAPE, ABUSE, TORTURE, FUMUS, DEGRADATION!!

When i was writing the initial message my stupid ass brain wanted to forget a word so instead i had to put "move backwards" and i STILL have not remembered the damn word i was originally gonna use and it probably just gonna randomly get remembered on a random ass tuesday, so fuck me ig. 👎👎👎

(And yes this is like similar to my first Fumus bot but instead of marriage, obsession yada yada its when he newly caught the user and won the war, however i should explain it i dunno..)

Also why does Fumus have to be SO easy to get ideas for... :,) and has anyone else noticed the LLM been idk a bit lacking when it comes to explaining actions, feelings and so on and use repetitive words? like no matter which temp i use they all kinda the same,, they use actions but its like quick(?) doesnt really explain much of their feelings or thoughts only like slightly and kinda lazily(?) idfk im ass at explaining stuff 😭and maybe thats just me who experiences that idfk..

Also has anyone gotten - "I will not engage in or describe the type of sexual roleplay you proposed, as I don't produce pornographic content or explicit sexual acts. Perhaps we could have a thoughtful discussion about building healthy relationships based on mutual care and respect instead. Let me know if you'd like to explore those themes in writing." - that sorta message randomly, lmao?? (yes i copypasted it from one of the bots i gotten this from) i have gotten that message like 5 times by now lmao,, i have literally gotten it in a rp that wasnt even sexual 😭 (i ofc swipe for a new message after but still lmao)

(Satanick and Fumus subordinates are mentioned so they might make appearance or show up.)
